attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SOLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SOLR.EP_HEADER_ID_INT
,SOLR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SOLR.NEW_SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SOLR.SS_CD
,SOLR.PRODUCT_KEY
,SOLR.NEW_PRODUCT_KEY
,SOLR.EP_PRODUCT_INV_ITEM_ID_INT
,SOLR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SOLR.NEW_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SOLR.EP_STC_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID_INT
,SOLR.SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,SOLR.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
,CAST(SOLR.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE
FROM 
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO_2 SOLR
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER()  OVER  (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE ORDER BY SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT 
NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NSOLNHT.EP_HEADER_ID_INT
,NSOLNHT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,NSOLNHT.SS_CD
,NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY
,NSOLNHT.EP_PRODUCT_INV_ITEM_ID_INT
,NSOLNHT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NSOLNHT.EP_STC_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID_INT
,NSOLNHT.SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,NSOLNHT.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
FROM 
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT_HIST_TV NSOLNHT
WHERE 
 NSOLNHT.PRODUCT_KEY =-999 OR NSOLNHT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999
 AND NSOLNHT.SS_CD <> 'OPL'
AND 
NSOLNHT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER ( ) OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ORDER BY EDW_UPDATE_DTM DESC) =1 /* SOLKEY ADDED AS A PART OF SERVICE FLAG RETRO CORRECTION */

SELECT 
* 
FROM 
(
SELECT 
SOLR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SOLR.EP_HEADER_ID_INT
,SOLR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SOLR.SALES_ORDER_KEY NEW_SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SOLR.SS_CD
,SOLR.PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN SOLR.PRODUCT_KEY =-999 THEN COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) ELSE SOLR.PRODUCT_KEY  END AS NEW_PRODUCT_KEY
,SOLR.EP_PRODUCT_INV_ITEM_ID_INT
,SOLR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,CASE WHEN SOLR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999 THEN COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) ELSE SOLR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS NEW_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SOLR.EP_STC_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID_INT
,SOLR.SO_LINE_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM
,SOLR.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO_1 SOLR
LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(SOLR.EP_PRODUCT_INV_ITEM_ID_INT=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
LEFT  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON ( SOLR.EP_STC_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID_INT=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )  
 ) TEMP
 WHERE  TEMP.NEW_PRODUCT_KEY <>TEMP.PRODUCT_KEY
 OR  TEMP.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY <>TEMP.NEW_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,DD_BK_INV_ORGANIZATION_NAME_CD    FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT
WHERE BK_INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY=-999 OR DD_BK_INV_ORGANIZATION_NAME_CD ='UNKNOWN'
AND EDW_UPDATE_DTM > ( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO')
AND SS_CD NOT IN ('OPL')

SELECT 
  NCR.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY,          
  NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,        
  NCR.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,          
  NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,          
  NCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,   
  NCR.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,            
  NCR.CDB_DATA_SOURCE_CODE,          
  NCR.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE,           
  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE,              
  NCR.NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,              
  NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,          
  NCR.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,          
  NCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY,               
  NCR.ES_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,            
  NCR.PROCESS_DATE,                  
  NCR.BK_SO_UPD_DATETIME,            
  NCR.BK_SCA_UPD_DATETIME,           
  NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,              
  NCR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,            
  NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
  NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
  NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,          
  NCR.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
  NCR.BK_SOL_UPD_DATETIME,           
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
  NCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,         
  NCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
  NCR.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
  NCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
  NCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
  NCR.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,           
  NCR.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,          
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
      /* spitani:added below 4 columns for OFFER ATTRIBUTION */
      NCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
      NCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
      NCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
      NCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
  NCR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT , /* Added as part of Q1FY15 - Offer Attribution*/
  NCR.SALES_MOTION_CD
,NCR.ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY    
,NCR.TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG         
,NCR.HISTORY_FLG                   
,NCR.ANNUAL_FLG                    
,NCR.ORIG_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT         
,NCR.DV_RUNNING_TOTAL_LOCAL_AMT    
,NCR.ORDER_VALUE_AMOUNT            
,NCR.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD            
,NCR.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_TRXL_AMT    
,NCR.UNIT_WHLSL_PRC_LST_LOC_AMT
,NCR.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/* Added as part of Epic 6200 */ 
,NCR.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  FROM 
  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX NCR
 WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
  WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX_PREV')
 AND  EDW_UPDATE_DTM <= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
  WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX_CURR')
 AND  NOT EXISTS  
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX NRT
 WHERE NRT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
  WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO' AND TABLE_NAME='MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX_PREV')
 AND NRT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =NCR.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY)  
 AND EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOL
 WHERE NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   /*AND NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD='SBP')   /*Q4FY16 XAAS  */
    AND NSOL.BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD in ('SBP', 'TSL' )
	AND NSOL.SS_CD NOT IN ('OPL'))
